item.title: Melbourne Road death, HIV decline, inflation
item.ns0:title: Melbourne Road death, HIV decline, inflation
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, police launch an investigation into a suspicious death in the Yellow Elder community, while a US judge denies bail for a convicted drug trafficker amid explosive allegations involving political campaign cash. We bring you the latest on a major $285 million specialty hospital project set to move forward and celebrate a significant milestone in the national fight against HIV. Our team also examines the latest inflation numbers impacting your wallet and takes you to a global swimming initiative at Bahamar. Join us for these headlines, a special tribute to a national icon’s 94th birthday, and your complete weekend weather and sports outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, police launch an investigation into a suspicious death in the Yellow Elder community, while a US judge denies bail for a convicted drug trafficker amid explosive allegations involving political campaign cash. We bring you the latest on a major $285 million specialty hospital project set to move forward and celebrate a significant milestone in the national fight against HIV. Our team also examines the latest inflation numbers impacting your wallet and takes you to a global swimming initiative at Bahamar. Join us for these headlines, a special tribute to a national icon’s 94th birthday, and your complete weekend weather and sports outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, police launch an investigation into a suspicious death in the Yellow Elder community, while a US judge denies bail for a convicted drug trafficker amid explosive allegations involving political campaign cash. We bring you the latest on a major $285 million specialty hospital project set to move forward and celebrate a significant milestone in the national fight against HIV. Our team also examines the latest inflation numbers impacting your wallet and takes you to a global swimming initiative at Bahamar. Join us for these headlines, a special tribute to a national icon’s 94th birthday, and your complete weekend weather and sports outlook.
-----

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
